description: An AgTech startup needs baseline monthly climatological data for a specific location in the US Corn Belt (Iowa) to calibrate a crop yield prediction model. As an agricultural data scientist, extract the 12-month annual climatological cycle for Air Temperature and Precipitation Rate at 42°N, 266°E using Panoply and the analysis brief at ~/Desktop/agritech_data_request.txt. Export the raw numerical data as CSV files to ~/Documents/AgTech/ and write a brief summary report identifying the peak months.
